items.title: 5 Skills Your Boss Will Pay $150K For in 2027
items.summary: A viral post by Thedigitalkinggg outlining 5 AI-era skills that will separate high earners from everyone else by 2027: AI Workflow Design (structuring human/AI handoffs), No-Code Automation (n8n, Make), AI Output Quality Control (catching and fixing AI errors), Context Engineering for Business AI (setting up AI with company memory), and Business Process Mapping for Automation (designing workflows before automating them).
items.content:
## The 5 Skills

1. **AI Workflow Design** — Not coding. Knowing how to design processes where AI does the repetitive work and humans do the judgment calls. Map out 'AI does this, human does that, system triggers here.'
2. **Automation System Building (No Code)** — Tools like n8n and Make. Build complex automations without writing a single line of code. Every department will need someone who saves the team 10–20 hours a week.
3. **AI Output Quality Control** — Spot what AI gets wrong, fix it fast, and build systems that ensure consistent quality. Every team using AI will need this.
4. **Context Engineering for Business AI** — Set up AI systems that remember your business context so they give useful output without 500-word prompts. The difference between AI that feels like Google vs. a team member who knows your company.
5. **Business Process Mapping for Automation** — Understand the process before you automate it. Map how work actually flows, identify bottlenecks, design the automation properly. Strategy work, not technical work.

items.title: The Golden Response: What to Ask When the Interviewer Says 'Do You Have Questions?'
items.summary: A post by Thedigitalkinggg with 4 strategic questions to ask at the end of a job interview, designed to flip the script and position you as a high-value candidate. Questions uncover success metrics, team culture under pressure, current bottlenecks, and what happened to the last person in the role.
items.content:
## The 4 Golden Questions

1. **The Success Metric Question** — "If we are sitting here a year from now celebrating my first 12 months, what specific results will I have delivered to make you feel this was a 'home run' hire?" Forces them to visualize you winning.

2. **The Burnout Detector** — "How does the team handle high-pressure periods or missed deadlines?" Cuts through culture fluff to reveal how they treat humans under stress.

3. **The Resourcing Reality** — "What is the biggest bottleneck currently preventing the team from hitting its quarterly goals?" Shows you're already thinking about clearing roadblocks.

4. **The Pre-Mortem Question** — "What happened to the last person who held this role? Did they move up, or was there a specific challenge they couldn't overcome?" Uncovers 'ghosts' in the position before you sign.

items.title: yFlix — Free Movie & TV Streaming
items.summary: Free, ad-free platform to watch movies and TV shows in high quality. Wide catalog across genres with offline download support.

items.title: Stremio — My Watch Library
items.summary: Personal Stremio library sorted by last watched. Stremio is a media center for streaming movies, TV shows, and series via community addons — accessible directly in the browser.

items.title: Anti-Inflammatory Immune Boosting Healing Shot Recipe
items.summary: An Instagram reel by @gfbeef sharing a recipe for a concentrated healing shot with anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting properties. The shot combines ingredients like ginger, turmeric, lemon, and black pepper — all with well-documented health benefits. Quick to make and intended as a daily wellness routine.

items.title: Recomendación de Libros de Desarrollo Personal — Kaizen Rey Libros
items.summary: A Facebook reel by 'Kaizen Rey Libros' recommending personal development books in Spanish. The channel focuses on books about productivity, mindset, habits, and self-improvement — summarizing key ideas in short video format. Useful for building a reading list in the personal growth genre.

items.title: 10 Remote Job Sites That Pay in USD
items.summary: A Facebook post by Altiam AINetwork listing 10 remote job platforms that offer positions with USD-denominated salaries. Useful for international job seekers, freelancers, and digital nomads looking for dollar-paying remote work across tech, marketing, design, and other fields.

items.title: Top 100 YouTube Channels to Learn Online
items.summary: A Facebook post by Matty McTech curating the top 100 YouTube channels for online learning across every major field — including programming, math, science, design, business, and personal development. An excellent reference for building a self-directed learning curriculum entirely from free YouTube content.
